concept: Can you make a game where I'm a professional package deliverer in a world where gravity randomly shifts direction? I have to carefully balance and secure my deliveries as the world periodically rotates, turning walls into floors and ceilings into walls. Different packages have unique properties - some are fragile, some are heavy, some are oddly shaped - requiring creative solutions for each delivery route. Local residents have adapted their architecture to the shifting gravity, creating mind-bending neighborhoods that serve as intricate puzzles for me to navigate.
